name: Golden Plains Wind Farm West
notable: Stage 2, 93x Vestas V162-6.2MW. Brings Golden Plains total to 1,333MW. Financial close reached.

timeline.title: Financial close for Stage 2
timeline.detail: Vestas EPC contract; EnergyAustralia PPA for 345 MW

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2027-03 to 2027-03-09 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

eis_specs.document_title: Golden Plains Wind Farm West Environment Effects Statement (EES)
eis_specs.hub_height_note: Nominated hub height per EES technology envelope
eis_specs.wind_speed_period: WAsP modelling at 100 m AGL consistent with Golden Plains East resource area
eis_specs.energy_yield_method: WAsP mesoscale modelling; EES energy yield assessment
eis_specs.connection_substation_name: Bulgana 220 kV substation (shared corridor with Golden Plains East)
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~25 km of new 220 kV transmission line; shares grid connection corridor with Golden Plains East stage
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: Shared 220 kV transmission corridor with Golden Plains East. Joint network augmentation significantly reduces per-project connection cost.
eis_specs.notes: Western stage of the Golden Plains project. 577 MW Vestas turbine order confirmed 2024. Shares the same EES approval and grid connection planning as Golden Plains East.
